name: Curried Lentils Rice
recipeInstructions:
1. Chop the tomatoes, scallions, and apple into bite-sized pieces.
2. In a pan, sauté the garlic and scallions in lemon juice, tamari, and water until fragrant.
3. Add the curry powder and cook for an additional minute to blend the flavors.
4. Incorporate the remaining ingredients: chopped tomatoes, mushrooms, apple, tomato paste, black pepper, red lentils, and cooked brown rice.
5. Heat the mixture thoroughly until all ingredients are well combined and heated through.
6. Serve the sauce over a generous portion of lentils and rice.
